name: Cheerios Treats
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup peanut butter, smooth or crunchy
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13x9 pan.
2. Melt the margarine.
3. Add marshmallows to the melted margarine and toss until they are evenly coated.
4. Microwave for 1 1/2 minutes on high, or until smooth when stirred.
5. Stir in the peanut butter.
6. Immediately add the cheerios®.
7. Mix lightly until well coated.
8. Using a greased spatula or wax paper, press the mixture into the prepared pan.
9. Cool and cut into squares.
